text: I was charged $49.99 twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.
response: We apologize for the duplicate charge. We have initiated a refund of $49.99 which should appear in 3-5 business days.

text: The dashboard keeps showing a 500 error when I try to export reports.
response: We are aware of the export issue and our engineering team is investigating. We will update you within 2 hours.

text: I noticed an unauthorized charge of $299 on my account. I did not make this purchase.
response: We take unauthorized charges very seriously. We have flagged your account for immediate review by our security team.

text: It would be great if you could add dark mode to the mobile app.
response: Thank you for the suggestion! We have logged your request for dark mode and shared it with our product team.

text: I want to cancel my subscription and get a full refund. The service has not worked properly.
response: We are sorry to hear about your experience. We have started processing your cancellation and refund request.

text: I cannot log into my account. The password reset email never arrives.
response: We understand how frustrating login issues can be. We have manually triggered a password reset link to your email.

text: How do I upgrade from the Basic plan to the Pro plan?
response: To upgrade your plan, go to Settings, then Billing, then Change Plan. You will see all available plans there.

text: My payment failed but the money was deducted from my bank account. Transaction ID: TXN-8834721.
response: We apologize for this issue. We have escalated your case with transaction ID TXN-8834721 for immediate investigation.

text: The API is returning 429 rate limit errors even though I am well under my quota.
response: We are investigating reports of incorrect rate limiting. Our infrastructure team is looking into this.

text: Could you add webhook support for real-time event notifications?
response: Great suggestion! Webhook support is on our roadmap. We have added your use case to the feature request.
